title: having a wetsuit
statement_1: If Jack is a scuba diver, he will bring his wetsuit.
response:
The speaker’s conditional says that if Jack is a scuba diver, he brings his wetsuit. This suggests that in worlds where Jack is a scuba diver, he owns a wetsuit to bring, but it doesn’t assert that he actually is a scuba diver. Given general knowledge that divers typically own wetsuits and the helpful, honest speaker chose this fact, it raises the plausibility that Jack has a wetsuit, but it doesn’t make it likely outright since the antecedent may be false.

Final decsion: mid likelihood
